task_completion.description: Create a daily chart for AAPL
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader chart window is open. The chart tab or title bar clearly shows 'AAPL' and the timeframe is set to 'Daily' or '1 Day'. Candlesticks or price bars should be visible on the chart.

task_completion.description: Configure the chart with an EMA (Period 50)
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Exponential Moving Average (EMA) line is plotted overlaid on the main price chart. The indicator label (usually in the top-left corner of the chart area) should read 'EMA (50)' or similar, indicating a period of 50.

task_completion.description: Configure the chart with an RSI (Period 14)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A separate sub-panel below the main price chart displays the Relative Strength Index (RSI). The indicator label for this panel should read 'RSI (14)', indicating a period of 14.

task_completion.description: Configure the chart with a MACD (Fast 12, Slow 26, Smooth 9)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A separate sub-panel below the main price chart displays the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator, typically showing lines and a histogram. The indicator label should read 'MACD (12, 26, 9)'.
The agent interacts with the 'Workspaces' menu in the NinjaTrader Control Center and clicks 'Save', or a 'Save Workspace' dialog is successfully completed.

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through NinjaTrader menus (e.g., New -> Chart, Indicators menu) rather than editing XML/JSON workspace files in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The chart successfully loaded and rendered the provided AAPL data
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart actually displays candlestick/bar data for AAPL with prices roughly between $125 and $260, rather than showing a blank chart or a 'Waiting for data' message.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is the NinjaTrader 8 desktop client on Windows, not a web browser showing TradingView, Yahoo Finance, or another charting platform.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses real AAPL stock market data spanning exactly 502 trading days from January 3, 2023 through December 31, 2024. The price range on the chart should be approximately $125 to $260. NinjaTrader 8 natively supports EMA, RSI, and MACD indicators with the requested parameters as built-in system indicators.
